task_completion.description: Verify that the Parking Lot Camera has been assigned the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a camera settings, properties window, or resource tree for the 'Parking Lot Camera' showing the tags 'Outdoor' and 'Vehicle'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Loading Dock Camera has been assigned the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a camera settings, properties window, or resource tree for the 'Loading Dock Camera' showing the tags 'Outdoor' and 'Logistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Entrance Camera has been assigned the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a camera settings, properties window, or resource tree for the 'Entrance Camera' showing the tags 'Outdoor' and 'Pedestrian'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Server Room Camera has been assigned the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a camera settings, properties window, or resource tree for the 'Server Room Camera' showing the tags 'Indoor' and 'Restricted'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Lobby Camera has been assigned the correct tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a camera settings, properties window, or resource tree for the 'Lobby Camera' showing the tags 'Indoor' and 'Public'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Storm Watch' layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layout tab at the top of the viewing area or an entry in the resource tree explicitly named 'Storm Watch'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Storm Watch' layout contains ONLY the outdoor-facing cameras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the active 'Storm Watch' layout in the main viewing area. It must display video feeds or panels for exactly three cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Loading Dock Camera', and 'Entrance Camera'. No indoor cameras should be present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the VMS graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with the Nx Witness VMS application windows, menus, and dialogs. The agent should not be using a terminal or command prompt to execute API scripts or curl commands to set tags.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the tags and layout names are entered into the actual VMS software fields, not just typed into Notepad, gedit, or another text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that 'Storm Watch' is a genuine layout in the VMS.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that 'Storm Watch' appears as a standard layout tab or resource within the Nx Witness interface, rather than a renamed folder or a mocked image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring tags in Nx Witness VMS. The required tags are: Parking Lot Camera (Outdoor, Vehicle), Loading Dock Camera (Outdoor, Logistics), Entrance Camera (Outdoor, Pedestrian), Server Room Camera (Indoor, Restricted), and Lobby Camera (Indoor, Public). A new layout named 'Storm Watch' must be created containing exactly the three 'Outdoor' cameras (Parking Lot Camera, Loading Dock Camera, Entrance Camera) and no others.
